problem: What physical process in the brain produces subjective conscious experience?
hypothesis: Dopamine/serotonin reuptake inhibition with specificity may resolve What physical process in the brain produces subjective conscious experience? by blocking at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: EEG/MEG signal analysis with 33 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
